Professional Summary

Results-driven software engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Strong background in distributed systems and cloud infrastructure. Track record of reducing operational costs and improving system reliability.

Professional Experience

Senior Software Engineer — Amazon Web Services Austin, TX 2020-01 – Present
  • Architected microservices platform serving 2M+ daily requests with 99.99% uptime
  • Led migration from monolith to event-driven architecture, reducing latency by 40%
  • Mentored 4 junior engineers through technical growth plans
Software Engineer — Stripe San Francisco, CA 2016-06 – 2019-12
  • Built payment processing pipeline handling $50M+ monthly volume
  • Implemented fraud detection system reducing chargebacks by 28%
  • Contributed to open-source SDK used by 10,000+ developers

Education

GPA: 3.7
